subcodes.first_line: O Thou kind and beloved Lord! These friends are exhilarated with the wine of the Covenant and are wanderers in the wilderness of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر مهربان این یاران سرمست جام پیمانند و در محبتت سرگشته و بادیه پیما از فراقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @service to others; to the Cause of God
